description_long: This is a medium-sized, crumpled plastic garbage bag with a predominantly orange and gray color scheme. The front side features the Linio.com logo and branding, while the reverse side displays the phrase '¡Ya llegué!' in bold, playful script. The bag appears to be made of thin, flexible plastic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. Its surface is wrinkled and uneven, suggesting it is partially filled but not tightly packed, and the top edge is irregular, lacking any visible closure mechanism. The bag is opaque, preventing any view of its contents, and is designed for single-use disposal in urban environments.
description: A crumpled orange and gray plastic garbage bag with branding and text, partially filled and glossy, with no visible closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Linio.com logo and branding on a wrinkled orange and gray plastic surface.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness and crumpled nature of the bag, with no visible closure or contents.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the phrase '¡Ya llegué!' in large script on the gray band, with more visible surface wrinkles.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the bag's thin, flexible structure and irregular top edge.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: partially filled with moderate wrinkling and some bulging, but not tightly packed
